summary: McKenzie shares a link to a survey of 96 micro-ISVs (micro independent software vendors) conducted by someone on the Business of Software forums. The preliminary results cover demographics, with sales data still to come. He encourages other bloggers to link to the survey as a way of rewarding community contributions.
key_points: A community member surveyed 96 micro-ISVs on demographics and business topics
McKenzie emphasizes that community contributors who do substantial work deserve recognition through links
He nudges fellow bloggers to support useful community research by linking to it
money_quotes: Anybody who does that much work for the community deserves links early and often.
key_insight: Community members who contribute substantial research deserve active support and promotion from fellow bloggers.
